purpose: Track Android bridge surface that is not true iOS parity yet.

statusLegend.missing_needs_triage: Android exposes the method and iOS does not. Treat as a parity gap until implemented or explicitly recorded as an iOS divergence.
statusLegend.ios_no_op_needs_decision: iOS exposes the method only as a stable no-op. Treat as a parity gap until implemented or explicitly recorded as an iOS divergence.
